_meta.description: Route + JSON Schema manifest for OpenAPI generation. Feed to /apidoc.

info.title: Robin API
info.description: REST API for Robin.OS — a personal knowledge management system.

cookieAuth.name: better-auth.session_token
cookieAuth.description: Session cookie set by better-auth after sign-in

routes.summary: Create a new entry (queues async processing)
Get all fragments derived from an entry

409.description: Entry is not in failed state

routes.summary: Get a fragment by ID (includes content and backlinks)
Accept fragment into a review-mode wiki
Reject fragment from a review-mode wiki
List wikis with pagination and fragment counts
Get wiki detail with fragments and people

200.description: Wiki detail with fragments and people

routes.summary: Audit timeline for a wiki and its fragments
Get edit history for a wiki
Toggle autoregen flag on a wiki
Publish a wiki with a stable nanoid slug
Unpublish a wiki (preserves slug for re-publish)
Get a wiki type by slug
Create a new user-defined wiki type
Seed default wiki types from YAML configs (idempotent)
Get a published wiki by nanoid slug (no auth)
Query the audit log with filters
Get a thread by ID (includes wiki content)
Get a person by ID (includes content and backlinks)
Hybrid search across fragments, wikis, and people
Get all relationships for an object

params.type: enum: entry, fragment, thread, vault, person

routes.summary: Get user's Ed25519 keypair metadata (no privateKey)
Reveal Ed25519 private key after password verify
